name: Light of Reversing Destiny
short_description: "Light of Reversing Destiny" is a live - action interactive movie game, skillfully blending role - playing and plot choices. Players follow the protagonist's perspective throughout, immerse in the ups - and - downs of the story, with interspersed mini - games bringing a new interactive feel.
detailed_description:
In The Light of Reversing Fate, every click represents a turn of fate, guiding you to embark on a unique counterattack adventure.

 

At the beginning of the game, Zhao Jialin, a deliveryman, leads a miserable life. However, a plunge into the sea becomes the key to his fate's transformation! He is reborn as Fu Yangguang, the adopted son of a gang boss, instantly gaining wealth, status, and good looks. But is this really the start of good luck or the prelude to another nightmare?

 

In the game, you will be caught in a complex plot web. The mysterious Meng Qi seems to have an intricate past with you; your adoptive father, Fu Chuan, harbors dark secrets; and what earth - shattering secret does the mysterious Qi Guang Gem hide that drives countless people crazy?

 

Even more excitingly, every choice you make will rewrite the plot. A casual decision might help you escape from a crisis, or it could push you into the abyss of doom. There are also hidden plots that may appear at any time. You never know when they will subvert your understanding of the whole story. Do you want to know if you can win this game of fate? Come and start this adventure now!

supported_languages:
Simplified Chinese*, English, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support
